ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotel" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel. */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel. */,
  "hotel_location" TEXT /* Location of the hotel. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_type" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type. */,
  "room_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the room type. */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests allowed in the room. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room. */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel that the room belongs to. */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room type. */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_pricing" (
  "season_pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season pricing record. */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season. */,
  "season_begin" TEXT /* Start date of the season. */,
  "season_end" TEXT /* End date of the season. */,
  "daily_rate" TEXT /* Daily rate for the season. */,
  "weekly_rate" TEXT /* Weekly rate for the season. */,
  "monthly_rate" TEXT /* Monthly rate for the season. */,
  "min_stay_days" INTEGER /* Minimum number of days required for a stay during the season. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_pricing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_strategy" (
  "pricing_strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing strategy. */,
  "pricing_strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing strategy. */,
  "season_pricing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season pricing. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate. */,
  "pricing_strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing strategy. */,
  "rate_amount" TEXT /* The rate amount. */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when the rate becomes effective. */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The date when the rate expires. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion. */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion. */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion. */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion. */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage offered by the promotion. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservation" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation. */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room. */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the guest. */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Arrival date of the guest. */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the guest. */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest. */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest. */,
  "guest_email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest. */,
  "guest_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program. */,
  "loyalty_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program. */,
  "points_per_stay" INTEGER /* Points awarded per stay. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_loyalty_program" (
  "guest_loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest loyalty program. */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the guest. */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program. */,
  "points_balance" INTEGER /* Current points balance. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_loyalty_program_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each room type.
Maximum number of guests allowed in the room.
Reference to the hotel that the room belongs to.
Unique identifier for each season pricing record.
Minimum number of days required for a stay during the season.
Unique identifier for each pricing strategy.
The date when the rate becomes effective.
The date when the rate expires.
Discount percentage offered by the promotion.
Unique identifier for each loyalty program.
Unique identifier for each guest loyalty program.
